global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with various game icons and text elements promoting a mobile game.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to engage with the game and claim rewards.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient fills the entire background, creating a vibrant and engaging atmosphere.

elements.label: Game icon
elements.description: A simple, stylized game icon with a square shape, featuring a light color palette.

elements.label: Game icon
elements.description: Another square-shaped game icon, similar in style to the previous one, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Game icon
elements.description: A third square-shaped game icon, slightly smaller and positioned to the left of the center.

elements.label: Game icon
elements.description: A fourth square-shaped game icon, positioned at the top left corner of the ad.

elements.label: Gameplay element
elements.description: A small circular gameplay element located at the top left, designed to indicate interaction.

elements.label: Gameplay element
elements.description: A small circular gameplay element positioned at the top right, similar in style to the previous one.

elements.label: Gameplay element
elements.description: A small circular gameplay element located towards the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Text description
elements.description: A small text element that provides additional information, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Text description
elements.description: Another small text element, similar to the previous one, positioned slightly to the left.

elements.label: Text description
elements.description: A small text element at the top center, providing context or information.

elements.label: Text description
elements.description: Another small text element at the top left, similar in style to the previous one.

elements.label: Game title
elements.description: The bold title 'VoxelRealm' displayed prominently at the top of the ad in a large font.

elements.label: Promotional message
elements.description: A larger text element that reads 'Level up today No ads in first week', positioned centrally.
elements.text_content: Level up today No ads in first week

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Claim reward', inviting user interaction.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by promotional text in the center, with icons and a CTA button at the bottom.
